notes:
## ✨ v2.1.0 — Voice Activity, Visual Effects per Rule, Ammo & Range

### New Features
* **Voice Activity Indicator**: See who's talking — HUD cards glow when a player speaks. Each player picks their glow color. Uses browser mic, independent of Discord. Opt-in world setting.
* **Per-Rule Visual Effects**: Dynamic Image Rules now carry their own filters, overlays, and tints. When a rule matches, its effects override the base Visual Effects.
* **D&D 5e Ammunition Management**: Weapons show equipped ammo inline with color-coded count. Dropdown to switch ammo, ± buttons to adjust.
* **PF2e Ammunition Management**: Strike menu shows equipped ammo per weapon with dropdown and ± controls. Ammo also appears in Inventory.
* **D&D 5e Spell & Weapon Range**: Spells show range inline next to components. Weapons show range alongside damage type.
* **Name Z-Index Control**: Layer name text above or behind the portrait.
* **Wrapper Z-Index & Offsets**: Z-index and X/Y controls for Status, Bars, Dots, Numbers, and Badges wrappers. Global defaults with per-actor override.

### Improvements
* Menu Category Drag Reorder now works.
* Cross-System Theme Import preserves action menu config.
* Discord Support Link in module settings.

### Bug Fixes
* Config Save Not Persisting (deep clone fix).
* Reset reverting immediately (preview race condition).
* Name Z-Index not working across all themes.
* Cyberpunk Name X/Y not applying.
* Long item names overlapping cost/range area.

announcement.title: ✨ v2.1.0: Voice Activity, Per-Rule Effects, Ammo & Range
announcement.content: New: Voice Activity Indicator — HUD cards glow when players speak. Per-Rule Visual Effects on Dynamic Image Rules. Full ammunition management for D&D 5e & PF2e. Inline spell/weapon range display. Wrapper Z-Index controls. Plus config save and Name Z-Index fixes.
